action.reasoning: Observation: best still 0.594 (iter16: replay=500/task balanced + KD beta=0.5/T=2 + consol=5eps@1e-4, early tasks~0.48 late~0.7-0.8, val~0.596). Iters17-23 all failed (down to 0.08) due to persistent train.py truncation (incomplete after DataLoader def; missing full training loop, scheduler.step(), KD calc, optimizer, mem update AFTER task, best-val tracking). Stdout shows task9 loss~12 (vs expected ~1-2), train_acc~0.03 (random), val~0.05-0.08 until weak consol. Curves confirm no post-task0 learning. Analysis: workspace truncation of long files is root cause; successful iter16 had complete balanced mem (meta+torch.where/randperm AFTER train), proper KD (KLDiv on log_softmax(old/T) vs softmax(new/T)*T**2), per-task Cosine reset, per-epoch val+best on val.pt, deepcopy old_model, final best ckpt. Replay+KD+consol+best-val proven to reach 0.59+. Decision: fully rewrite COMPLETE concise non-truncated train.py exactly matching successful params (mem=500/task, epochs/task=6, consol=5, Adam(5e-4,1e-5), KD beta=0.5 T=2.0 with correct KL, CosineAnnealingLR reset per-task, dense logging every20steps+val/best per epoch, mem update AFTER each task train using current task only, final best ckpt). Keep model.py/predict.py. This will recover ~0.59; run training then submit_eval on best checkpoint.
